prompts.name: Modern Clean Anime
prompts.text: Use a modern clean anime look with crisp line clarity, polished color, expressive eyes, and controlled detail.

prompts.name: Soft Anime Movie
prompts.text: Use a soft anime movie style with gentle lighting, emotional color, cinematic framing, and natural character appeal.

prompts.name: Anime Realism
prompts.text: Blend anime character design with realistic lighting, believable materials, natural color, and polished semi-real detail.

prompts.name: Slice of Life Anime
prompts.text: Use a cozy slice-of-life anime feel with natural everyday detail, warm expressions, and relaxed atmosphere.

prompts.name: Fantasy Adventure Anime
prompts.text: Use a fantasy adventure anime look with vibrant environments, heroic composition, and clear magical storytelling.

prompts.name: Dark Fantasy Anime
prompts.text: Use a dark fantasy anime look with dramatic mood, ornate details, rich shadows, and restrained supernatural atmosphere.

prompts.name: Idol Stage Anime
prompts.text: Use an idol-stage anime look with sparkling lighting, energetic color, stage presence, and polished performance detail.

prompts.name: Romance Anime
prompts.text: Use a romance anime feeling with soft expressions, warm lighting, gentle color harmony, and emotional closeness.

prompts.name: Action Anime
prompts.text: Use an action anime look with dynamic motion, strong silhouettes, expressive poses, and energetic composition.

prompts.name: Comedy Anime
prompts.text: Use a light comedy anime feeling with playful expression, lively body language, and charming exaggeration kept readable.

prompts.name: School Life Anime
prompts.text: Use a school-life anime atmosphere with clean character presentation, natural classroom or campus detail, and youthful everyday energy.

prompts.name: Magical Girl Anime
prompts.text: Use a magical-girl anime style with elegant transformation energy, sparkling effects, bright colors, and graceful heroic charm.

prompts.name: Cyberpunk Anime
prompts.text: Use a cyberpunk anime style with neon lighting, futuristic fashion, dense urban detail, and sleek tech atmosphere.

prompts.name: Soft Watercolor Anime
prompts.text: Use a soft watercolor anime finish with gentle edges, delicate color washes, and dreamy atmosphere.

prompts.name: Classic Anime Feeling
prompts.text: Use a classic anime-inspired feeling with bold shapes, expressive eyes, warm color, and nostalgic presentation.
